Defendants Carjo Properties, Llc., Joy Brorsen, And Norman Bouton'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And Production Of Documents By Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dana Andreoli (415-421-3400) of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP for Plaintiff/opposing party Old Republic National Title Insurance Company.
Marco Quazzo (415-956-1900) of Bartko Zankel Bunzel for Defendants/Moving party Carjo Properties, LLC., Joy Brorsen, And Norman Bouton.

The Court announces its Tentative Ruling, states the referees were clear and is leaning toward adopting the tentative ruling.

9:30am Parties are ordered to meet and confer in the hallway.

10:00am Parties report they have no resolution. Both sides ARGUED re: language on the order for producing documents.

10:11am The Court orders parties to meet and confer to create a specific list of disputes.

10:40am Parties inform the clerk an agreement cannot be reached made re: list. Clerk informs the court. Court orders more meet and confer in hallway.

11:19am Parties inform the clerk they have a list of disputed items. Clerk informs the Court.

11:24am Court orders parties to continue discussion. re: settlement on disputed items and work on tentative ruling.

11:36am Parties are ordered in Chambers.

11:43am Conference concludes. The Court orders further discussion in Hallway.

11:50am Parties have reached stipulated agreement.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tenative ruling subject to modification agreed to by parties as follows:

Defendants Carjo Properties, LLC., Joy Brorsen, And Norman Bouton's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests And Production Of Documents By Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company is granted in part and denied in part. The tentative ruling is adopted subject to modification agreed to by parties. Parties to submit an order in conformity no later than 3/3/17 in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: S. Le. Not reported. (501)
